input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: drive by wire control of wheel torque is permitted

EV.3.1.2 Drive by wire control of wheel torque is permitted

final_answer: Drive by wire control of wheel torque is permitted
